s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT INNER WITH CENTER BELT ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Check the degree of the tilt when the ELR begins to lock.

s3.ptxt: Check that the belt does not lock at less than 15 degrees of tilt in any direction but locks at over 45 degrees of tilt while gently pulling the belt.

s2.ptxt: Align the claw with the seat belt positioning hole and install the rear seat inner with center belt assembly LH with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL PACKAGE TRAY TRIM PANEL ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Pass the 3 rear seat belt floor anchors through the package tray trim panel assembly.
Engage the 4 clips and 5 claws and install the package tray trim panel assembly.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL PACKAGE TRAY TRIM PANEL ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Pass the 3 rear seat belt floor anchors through the package tray trim panel assembly.
Engage the 4 clips and 5 claws and install the package tray trim panel assembly.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT SHOULDER BELT HOLE COVER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the rear seat shoulder belt hole cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT SHOULDER BELT COVER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the rear seat shoulder belt cover.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT REAR SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Connect the floor end of the rear seat outer belt assembly with the bolt.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the rear seat outer belt assembly to overlap the protruding parts of the floor panel.

s2.ptxt: Check if the ELR locks.

atten3.ptxt: The check should be performed with the outer belt assembly installed.

s3.ptxt: With the belt assembly installed, check that the belt locks when it is pulled out quickly.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT REAR SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY (for RH Side)

s2.ptxt: Connect the floor end of the rear seat outer belt assembly with the bolt.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the rear seat outer belt assembly to overlap the protruding parts of the floor panel.

s2.ptxt: Check if the ELR locks.

atten3.ptxt: The check should be performed with the outer belt assembly installed.

s3.ptxt: With the belt assembly installed, check that the belt locks when it is pulled out quickly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF SIDE INNER GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 clips and 2 claws, then install the roof side inner garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF SIDE INNER GARNISH RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT REAR SEAT INNER WITH CENTER BELT ASSEMBLY LH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect the floor end of the rear seat inner with center belt assembly LH with the bolt.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the rear seat inner with center belt assembly LH to overlap the protruding parts of the floor panel.

s2.ptxt: Check if the ELR locks.

atten3.ptxt: The check should be performed with the outer belt assembly installed.

s3.ptxt: With the belt assembly installed, check that the belt locks when it is pulled out quickly.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT REAR SEAT INNER WITH CENTER BELT ASSEMBLY LH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect the floor end of the rear seat inner with center belt assembly LH with the nut.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the rear seat inner with center belt assembly LH to overlap the protruding parts of the floor panel.

s2.ptxt: Check if the ELR locks.

atten3.ptxt: The check should be performed with the outer belt assembly installed.

s3.ptxt: With the belt assembly installed, check that the belt locks when it is pulled out quickly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT INNER WITH CENTER BELT ASSEMBLY RH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat inner with center belt assembly RH with the bolt.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the rear seat inner with center belt assembly RH to overlap the protruding parts of the floor panel.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT INNER WITH CENTER BELT ASSEMBLY RH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat inner with center belt assembly RH with the nut.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the rear seat inner with center belt assembly RH to overlap the protruding parts of the floor panel.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CHILD RESTRAINT SEAT ANCHOR BRACKET SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Install the child restraint seat anchor bracket sub-assembly with the 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CHILD RESTRAINT SEAT ANCHOR BRACKET SUB-ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY LH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat reclining control cable.
Engage the 2 clips and claw and then install the reclining remote control lever sub-assembly.
Install the bolt.
Adjust the control lever to set the rear reclining adjuster assembly to its upper most position.
Pull plate A toward the front of the vehicle to lock the plate.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY RH (for Reclining Seat Type)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP LH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door opening trim weatherstrip LH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws and 2 clips, then install the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP RH

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door opening trim weatherstrip RH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CENTER SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the center seat back assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly LH with the 2bolts and 2 nuts.
Engage the 3 clamps and install the cover.
Install the 2 rear seat belts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly RH with the 2 bolts and 2 nuts.
Engage the 3 clamps and install the cover.
Install the rear seat belt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK COVER (for Reclining Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear side seat back assembly with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Place the seat back in the cabin.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the vehicle body.

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat back assembly with the 4 bolts.
Pass the 3 seat belts through and close the cap of the 2 rear seat shoulder belt guides.
Install the floor anchor part with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR CENTER SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY
INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Attach the 2 front hooks of the seat cushion to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the seat cushion, make sure the seat belt buckle is not under the seat cushion.
